user.title: Hisense VIDAA TV (CDP)
user.description: Connects to the unauthenticated Chrome DevTools Protocol the TV exposes on port 9223. The TV must be powered on for setup to succeed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the TV's CDP endpoint. Check the host, and that the TV is powered on.

init.title: Polling interval
init.description: How often to poll the TV via CDP. The TV must be powered on; when it's off, the integration backs off to the offline interval until it comes back.
